title: Fallout Foods
description: A mod that hopes to recreate foods from the game series, "Fallout," in a vanilla-friendly way. This also includes extra features, such as non-consumables.
body:
![Fallout Foods Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ec4543d177d97c943653e0dd95e9c7f32e47e70.png)
This mod reimagines Fallout food items in a way that can be used in Minecraft survival.

-  VIDEO: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4S-aGN2mUJQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Current MAIN Additions (VERSION 1.0.2 - The Pip-Boy Update):

- Nuka Cola
- Sugar Bombs
- Perfectly Preserved Pie
- Deathclaw Egg Omelette
- Vault Suit Full Set
- Liquid Chocolate
- S'mores
- BlamCo Mac & Cheese
- Wastelands Biome
- Pip-Boy 3000
![Pip-Boy 3000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ada7564531c14e7812ad95cc26ee4297e0e68fde.png)
  ### Extras:
  - Empty Nuka Cola (Weapon)
  - Phosphorus 
  - Unfinished Bowl, Bowl, Bowl of BlamCo Mac & Cheese, and Bowl of Sugar Bombs - Bowl is reusable
  - Cardboard
  - Unfinished Plate and Plate - Plate is reusable
  - Vault Suit Armor Set
  - Molotov Cocktail
  - Blood Pack
  - Uranium
  - Bottle Caps
# To-Be Added
